ingredients.item: ¼ cup (60 ml) olive oil
ingredients.original: ¼ cup (60 ml) olive oil

ingredients.item: 2 medium yellow onions, thinly sliced
ingredients.original: 2 medium yellow onions, thinly sliced

ingredients.item: 3 teaspoons kosher salt, divided, plus more if needed
ingredients.original: 3 teaspoons kosher salt, divided, plus more if needed

ingredients.item: 4 large cloves garlic, thinly sliced
ingredients.original: 4 large cloves garlic, thinly sliced

ingredients.item: 3 teaspoons dried mint
ingredients.original: 3 teaspoons dried mint

ingredients.item: 1½ teaspoons ground turmeric
ingredients.original: 1½ teaspoons ground turmeric

ingredients.item: 18 ounces (510 g) canned chickpeas, drained and rinsed
ingredients.original: 18 ounces (510 g) canned chickpeas, drained and rinsed

ingredients.item: 18 ounces (510 g) canned kidney beans, drained and rinsed
ingredients.original: 18 ounces (510 g) canned kidney beans, drained and rinsed

ingredients.item: 1 cup (200 g) green lentils, rinsed and drained
ingredients.original: 1 cup (200 g) green lentils, rinsed and drained

ingredients.item: 5 ounces (140 g) spaghetti or bucatini pasta
ingredients.original: 5 ounces (140 g) spaghetti or bucatini pasta

ingredients.item: 1½ cups (45 g) finely chopped fresh dill, thick stems removed
ingredients.original: 1½ cups (45 g) finely chopped fresh dill, thick stems removed

ingredients.item: 1 cup (60 g) finely chopped fresh parsley
ingredients.original: 1 cup (60 g) finely chopped fresh parsley

ingredients.item: 1 cup (60 g) finely chopped fresh cilantro
ingredients.original: 1 cup (60 g) finely chopped fresh cilantro

ingredients.item: 2 cups (60 g) roughly chopped spinach
ingredients.original: 2 cups (60 g) roughly chopped spinach

ingredients.item: 1 cup (240 ml) sour cream or Greek yogurt
ingredients.original: 1 cup (240 ml) sour cream or Greek yogurt

ingredients.item: 1 In a large pot, heat the ¼ cup (60 ml) oil over medium-high heat for 1 minute. Add the onions and 1 teaspoon of the salt and cook, stirring often, for 10 minutes, or until softened and lightly golden. Stir in the garlic, mint, and turmeric and cook for another 30 seconds, or until the garlic is fragrant. Remove about one-quarter of this mixture and reserve to use as garnish.
ingredients.original: 1 In a large pot, heat the ¼ cup (60 ml) oil over medium-high heat for 1 minute. Add the onions and 1 teaspoon of the salt and cook, stirring often, for 10 minutes, or until softened and lightly golden. Stir in the garlic, mint, and turmeric and cook for another 30 seconds, or until the garlic is fragrant. Remove about one-quarter of this mixture and reserve to use as garnish.

ingredients.item: 2 Add the chickpeas, kidney beans, and lentils along with 10 cups (2.4 L) of water. Cover and cook over medium heat for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally, or until the lentils are tender.
ingredients.original: 2 Add the chickpeas, kidney beans, and lentils along with 10 cups (2.4 L) of water. Cover and cook over medium heat for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally, or until the lentils are tender.

ingredients.item: 3 Break the spaghetti in half and add it to the pot with the remaining 2 teaspoons salt. Cover and cook for 10 minutes over medium heat. Once the pasta is al dente, add the dill, parsley, cilantro, and spinach and cook for 5 to 7 minutes, until the herbs have wilted. Add the lemon juice, stir, and then taste and adjust for lemon juice and/or salt if necessary.
ingredients.original: 3 Break the spaghetti in half and add it to the pot with the remaining 2 teaspoons salt. Cover and cook for 10 minutes over medium heat. Once the pasta is al dente, add the dill, parsley, cilantro, and spinach and cook for 5 to 7 minutes, until the herbs have wilted. Add the lemon juice, stir, and then taste and adjust for lemon juice and/or salt if necessary.

ingredients.item: 4 TO MAKE THE MINT OIL FOR GARNISH: Heat the 3 tablespoons oil in a small skillet over medium heat for 1 minute. Add the mint and stir for 20 seconds, or until it turns dark green. Remove from the heat.
ingredients.original: 4 TO MAKE THE MINT OIL FOR GARNISH: Heat the 3 tablespoons oil in a small skillet over medium heat for 1 minute. Add the mint and stir for 20 seconds, or until it turns dark green. Remove from the heat.

ingredients.item: 5 Ladle into bowls and top with a bit of the reserved onion-garlic mixture, a few teaspoons of the mint oil, and a few large dollops of sour cream or yogurt.
ingredients.original: 5 Ladle into bowls and top with a bit of the reserved onion-garlic mixture, a few teaspoons of the mint oil, and a few large dollops of sour cream or yogurt.
